title: Where Is Cosmo?
description: Cosmo has hidden somewhere in the classroom. Use ON, IN, UNDER, NEXT TO, and BEHIND to find him.
summary_pt_br: O Cosmo se escondeu na sala. A turma tem que usar preposições de lugar (on, in, under, next to, behind) para achá-lo. Aprenda os objetos da sala e as preposições em contexto.

scenes.text_en:
The door swung shut. The dog was GONE.
'Where is Cosmo?' called Mr. Kumar, aghast.
Maya jumped up. Rafa grabbed his phone.
'Let's find him,' said Bia. 'But first — look fast!'
scenes.text_pt:
A porta se fechou. O cachorro SUMIU.
'Cadê o Cosmo?' Mr. Kumar quase morreu.
Maya saltou. Rafa pegou o celular.
'Vamos achá-lo,' falou Bia. 'Mas sem titubear!'

items.example_en: The book is on the desk.
The pen is in the drawer.
The dog is under the chair.

scenes.text_en:
Is he ON the chair? No, no, no.
Is he IN the drawer? No, no, NO.
Is he UNDER the desk? Maya checked — no!
NEXT TO the whiteboard? Nope. Uh-oh.
BEHIND the door…? A tiny BARK.
Cosmo! The dog had made his mark.
scenes.text_pt:
Está EM CIMA da cadeira? Não, não, não.
ESTÁ DENTRO da gaveta? Não, não, NÃO.
EMBAIXO da mesa? Maya checou — também não!
AO LADO do quadro? Nadica. Pra leão.
ATRÁS da porta…? Um latido discreto.
Cosmo! O cachorro fechou o decreto.

exercise.question: The ball is resting on top of the table. Which preposition?
exercise.explanation: ON = touching a surface from above. On the table, on the floor, on the wall.
exercise.hint_pt_br: ON = em cima, apoiado em uma superfície.

exercise.question: The cat is INSIDE the box. Which preposition?
exercise.explanation: IN = inside. In the box, in my pocket, in the backpack.

exercise.question: Complete: 'Cosmo is ___ the door.' (he's on the other side of it, hidden)
exercise.explanation: BEHIND = on the far side. A dog hiding out of sight is BEHIND the door.
exercise.hint_pt_br: BEHIND = atrás de. Cosmo escondido atrás da porta.

turns.en: He's IN the backpack. All of him.
turns.pt: Ele está DENTRO da mochila. Inteiro.

exercise.explanation: Five prepositions that cover ~90% of 'where is it?' questions.
exercise.hint_pt_br: Essas cinco preposições cobrem quase tudo.

scenes.title: 'There is / there are' for existence
scenes.body_en: When you want to say something EXISTS or is PRESENT, English uses 'there is' (singular) or 'there are' (plural) — NOT 'have'. 'There is a dog in the backpack' = Tem um cachorro na mochila.
scenes.body_pt: 'Tem' de existir é 'there is / there are' em inglês — NUNCA 'have'. 'Tem um cachorro na mochila' = 'There IS a dog in the backpack'.

examples.en: There is a book on the desk.
There are two dogs in the room.
